title: hymenophyllum angustum
intro: Hymenophyllum angustum is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the filmy ferns or air ferns. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum angustum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Hymenophyllum angustum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
